'''shazhanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacky|vacky]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacky|vacky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shazhanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzhængæth|shæzhængæth]] || [[word:shæzhængæj|shæzhængæj]] || [[word:shæzhængæsh|shæzhængæsh]] || [[word:shæzhængæ|shæzhængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhazhangath|shazhazhangath]] || [[word:shazhazhangaj|shazhazhangaj]] || [[word:shazhazhangash|shazhazhangash]] || [[word:shazhazhanga|shazhazhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhangath|shazhangath]] || [[word:shazhangaj|shazhangaj]] || [[word:shazhangash|shazhangash]] || [[word:shazhanga|shazhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhafngath|shazhafngath]] || [[word:shazhafngaj|shazhafngaj]] || [[word:shazhafngash|shazhafngash]] || [[word:shazhafngaf|shazhafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazhangatha|shazhangatha]] || [[word:shazhangaja|shazhangaja]] || [[word:shazhangasha|shazhangasha]] || [[word:shazhangaka|shazhangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazhangath|shazhangath]] || [[word:shazhangaj|shazhangaj]] || [[word:shazhangash|shazhangash]] || [[word:shazhanga|shazhanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazhangathal|shazhangathal]] || [[word:shazhangajal|shazhangajal]] || [[word:shazhangashal|shazhangashal]] || [[word:shazhangakal|shazhangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazhangathatha|shazhangathatha]] || [[word:shazhangajaja|shazhangajaja]] || [[word:shazhangashasha|shazhangashasha]] || [[word:shazhangaka|shazhangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazhangathan|shazhangathan]] || [[word:shazhangajan|shazhangajan]] || [[word:shazhangashan|shazhangashan]] || [[word:shazhangakan|shazhangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazhangathaoro|shazhangathaoro]] || [[word:shazhangajaoro|shazhangajaoro]] || [[word:shazhangashaoro|shazhangashaoro]] || [[word:shazhangakaoro|shazhangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
